description: Coordinated release configuration for CrewChief packages

@crewchief/cli.notes: Core CLI - must be released first as other packages depend on it

@crewchief/maproom-mcp.notes: MCP server - docs reference CLI for migrations/scanning

vscode-maproom.notes: VSCode extension - bundles own binary, self-contained

rustBinary.name: maproom
rustBinary._win32_note: win32-x64 is listed for planned support but not yet built by reusable-rust-build.yml (no Windows runner or MSVC target configured). Add Windows matrix entry to reusable-rust-build.yml when win32 builds are needed.
